profile.name: Your Name
profile.title: Your Professional Title
profile.tagline: One-line pitch about who you are and the value you bring.
profile.summary: A short paragraph (2-4 sentences) giving an overview of your career, your areas of expertise, and what kind of work you're looking for. Keep it generalistic and outcome-focused.

achievements: Led a project that achieved a measurable, impressive result (include a number if you can).
Delivered something notable that saved time, money, or improved a key metric.
Recognition, award, or milestone you're proud of.

highlights: Impact-focused bullet: what you did and the result it produced.
Scope, scale, or technologies that give context.
Key responsibility and the outcome you drove.
A project or initiative you led or contributed to.

projects.name: Project One
projects.description: A one-line description of what the project does and why it matters.

projects.name: Project Two
projects.description: Another short, clear description of the project's purpose and impact.
